title: Creation of the Innovation University and the Media 2008
description: The data consist of 15 face-to-face interviews studying the thoughts of Finnish elite power brokers on the media and its influence on their work. The example case in these interviews was the creation of an Innovation University (subsequently called the Aalto University) in Finland by merging three existing universities. Questions covered what kind of impact media publicity had had on planning and decision-making regarding the Innovation University, the relationship between the media and the inte
